description:
Implement the Calendar Day View (hourly timetable format) in the CalendarView component.

## Requirements

### File: `src/components/calendar-view.tsx`

Add a `renderDayView()` function that:
- Shows an hourly grid from configurable range (default: 10:00 to 06:00 next day — club hours)
- Each hour is a row on the Y axis
- Events are rendered as horizontal blocks spanning their door_time → end_time
- Events color-coded by status: published=green, draft=yellow, cancelled=red, completed=zinc
- Multiple events at the same time stack vertically (max 3, then "+N more")
- Click event → navigation to `/events/[id]`
- "Today" button to jump back to current day
- Prev/Next arrows change day
- An empty day shows "No events scheduled"

### Integration
- Wire up the existing view mode toggle (month/week/day) so all 3 modes work
- The `ViewMode` type already includes `"day"` — just needs the rendering
- Keep the month and week views working as before

### Tests
- Test day view renders correct hours
- Test event blocks span correct time ranges
- Test multiple events at same time stack correctly
- Test empty day shows "No events" message
- Test click navigates to /events/[id]

### Mobile
- Hourly grid should be scrollable (overflow-y-auto) on small screens
- Event blocks should be tappable (min 44px touch target)

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
